message:
Implement net sockets and http.createServer with polyfill consolidation

Major changes:
- Consolidated polyfill system: node_polyfill.js is now single source of truth
- Removed duplicate node_polyfills.zig and src/polyfills/node/*.js files
- Added real net.Socket and net.Server using Unix domain sockets
- Implemented http.createServer() using net socket infrastructure
- Fixed "Invalid free" panic by using page_allocator on WASM
- Added socket host bridge (create, bind, listen, accept, connect, read, write, close)
- Added socket native bindings in wasm_main.zig and wasm_main_static.zig
- Updated wizer_init.zig to load embedded polyfills directly

Socket architecture:
- Each WASM instance gets isolated socket namespace via /tmp/edgebox-{pid}/
- Multiple boxes can use same virtual port safely (separate Unix socket files)
- Non-blocking I/O with polling pattern (0=pending, 1=complete, <0=error)
